detail: Completed broader validation after migrating ticket-cli/session-cli/ticket-mcp/session-mcp path surfaces to strict normalization kernel. Passed: cargo test -p ticket-cli (118 passed), cargo test -p session-cli (8 passed), cargo test -p session-mcp (3 passed), cargo test -p memory-api workspace:: (33 passed). Blocker: cargo test -p ticket-mcp fails to execute integration_update_mcp binary with Windows elevation error 740 ("Der angeforderte Vorgang erfordert erhöhte Rechte"). Reproduced with cargo test -p ticket-mcp --test integration_update_mcp.
